name: Pennant of Revolution
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>革</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>命</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>御</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>み</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>旗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はた</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If another card(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can add 1 "Liberty at Last!" from your Deck or GY to your hand. At the start of the Damage Step, if a Synchro Monster battles a monster: You can destroy your opponent's battling monster. If this card in the Spell & Trap Zone would be destroyed by a card effect, you can destroy 1 monster you control instead. You can only use each effect of "Pennant of Revolution" once per turn.
eff: If another card(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can add 1 "Liberty at Last!" from your Deck or GY to your hand. At the start of the Damage Step, if a Synchro Monster battles a monster: You can destroy your opponent's battling monster. If this card in the Spell & Trap Zone would be destroyed by a card effect, you can destroy 1 monster you control instead. You can only use each effect of "Pennant of Revolution" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Destroys battling monster at the start of the Damage Step
Cannot be destroyed by card effects
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
